mapper.select: SELECT * FROM categories WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM categories WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC, create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO categories (name, parent_id, sort, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{name}, #{parentId}, #{sort}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
mapper.update:
UPDATE categories
name = #{category.name}, parent_id = #{category.parentId}, sort = #{category.sort}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{category.id} AND is_deleted = 0
